title: ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. orbelicum
intro: Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. orbelicum, commonly known as the Orbelicum Ornithogalum, is a rare, geophytic perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Bulgaria. As a member of the Asparagaceae family, this plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. orbelicum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant's underground parts are used to prepare herbal infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems.
